redemptionType: Issuer redemption via USYC Teller into USDC
liquidityNotes: Official documentation describes onchain subscription and redemption through USYC Teller using USDC. Circle/Hashnote sources indicate liquidity can settle in one block below available instant-redemption capacity and T+0/T+1 above that capacity. Exact capacity, thresholds, private liquidity terms, and official minimum redemption amount were not publicly verified. Redemption fee is recorded as 3 bps from official fee documentation, represented here as 0.03 percent.

_meta.notes: Liquidity is strong for permissioned issuer redemption but not fully transparent for open secondary-market liquidity. liquidityScore is conservative because instant capacity, thresholds, bid-ask spread, DEX liquidity, and minimum redemption amount are incomplete.
